stories.title: Follow live: 76ers set tone early at home, hold ed...
stories.summary: Live coverage of the New York Knicks vs. Philadelphia 76ers NBA game on ESPN, including live score, highlights and updated stats.

stories.title: Jets give RB Hall 3-year, $45.75M extension
stories.summary: The Jets and RB Breece Hall agreed to a three-year, $45.75 million contract Friday -- the third-highest annual average value among running backs.

stories.title: Sources: Seahawks interest 'soft' from buyers
stories.summary: The Seahawks haven't generated as much buyer interest as NFL officials originally expected, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Sources: Iowa, McCollum finalizing 6-year deal
stories.summary: Iowa and coach Ben McCollum are finalizing a new six-year contract after the Hawkeyes' surprising run to the Elite Eight, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Mavs hire Blazers' Schmitz as GM under Ujiri
stories.summary: The Mavericks are hiring former Blazers assistant GM Mike Schmitz to run the franchise's basketball operations under president Masai Ujiri.
